messages.content: # Here is how to fix the “CPU Occupancy > 99%” warning.

## Method 1
> **Change the following settings:**
> Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > General Patch Settings > Optimizations
> Tick "Use SIMD-Accelerated culling for tracks" | Disable "Force Cull Tests"
> 
> Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > General Patch Settings > CPU Optimizations
> Chunks Optimization - Advanced for SRP | Basic for 110
> 
> Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > General Patch Settings > FPS Limiter Options
> Tick "Adjust Frame Time to improve smoothness"
